title: Hierarchical compile fails with structs as IO

features.name: packed struct as module IO port in hierarchical block
features.description: Code should include a typedef struct packed definition used as an output port in a module marked with /*verilator hier_block*/ annotation for hierarchical compilation

features.name: hierarchical block module with struct port connection
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical block submodule instantiated in a parent module, where the child has struct-typed IO ports
